source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
A circle inscribed in a square. Has two chords as shown in a pair. It has radius $2$, and $P$ bisects $TU$. The chords' intersection is where? Answer the question by giving the distance of the point of intersection from the center of the circle.
<image1>
